# @swui/ui-tokens

> AI / agent quick index. Prefer AGENTS.md for full rules.

## Package

- Name: `@swui/ui-tokens`
- Entry CSS: `@swui/ui-tokens/tokens.css` (also `@swui/ui-tokens`)
- Role: design tokens only (no React)

## Must read

- AGENTS.md
- docs/TOKENS.md
- docs/ADOPTION.md

## Sibling packages

- `@swui/ui` — React primitives + ThemeProvider + WideScreenGate


## Theme contract

- global light/dark runtime is owned by @swui/ui ThemeProvider
- `:root` + reserved `.dark` CSS both ship

## Install sketch

```css
@import "tailwindcss";
@import "@swui/ui-tokens/tokens.css";
```
